mapper.select:
SELECT v.maVe, v.gheNgoi, v.maHanhKhach, v.maChuyen, v.ngayMua,
-- Passenger p.maHanhKhach as p_maHanhKhach, p.hoTen as p_hoTen, p.soDienThoai as p_soDienThoai, p.email as p_email,
-- Trip t.maChuyen as t_maChuyen, t.ngayGioKhoiHanh as t_ngayGioKhoiHanh, t.ngayGioDen as t_ngayGioDen, t.diemDi as t_diemDi, t.diemDen as t_diemDen, t.trangThai as t_trangThai
FROM ve v LEFT JOIN hanhkhach p ON v.maHanhKhach = p.maHanhKhach LEFT JOIN chuyenxe t ON v.maChuyen = t.maChuyen

SELECT v.maVe, v.gheNgoi, v.maHanhKhach, v.maChuyen, v.ngayMua,
p.maHanhKhach as p_maHanhKhach, p.hoTen as p_hoTen, p.soDienThoai as p_soDienThoai, p.email as p_email,
t.maChuyen as t_maChuyen, t.ngayGioKhoiHanh as t_ngayGioKhoiHanh, t.ngayGioDen as t_ngayGioDen, t.diemDi as t_diemDi, t.diemDen as t_diemDen, t.trangThai as t_trangThai
FROM ve v LEFT JOIN hanhkhach p ON v.maHanhKhach = p.maHanhKhach LEFT JOIN chuyenxe t ON v.maChuyen = t.maChuyen WHERE v.maVe = #{maVe}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Ve (gheNgoi, maHanhKhach, maChuyen, ngayMua) VALUES (#{gheNgoi}, #{maHanhKhach}, #{maChuyen}, #{ngayMua})
